description: Omio is a travel booking platform for trains, buses, flights, and ferries. It also offers B2B travel-content integrations and white-label solutions for partners.
summary: Omio exposes one documented HTTP API surface on omio.com: a schedules search API described by an OpenAPI document for its ChatGPT/plugin integration; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found on omio.com.
